name: @sciforge/evidence-dag
description: Standalone Evidence-DAG engine: turns an agent trace into a typed claim-evidence DAG, verifies supports edges with an NLI judge, and serialises to PROV-JSON. HTTP service (ServiceResult-only).

sciforge.packagingStrategy: Python sidecar (stdlib + networkx, requires-python >=3.10). `npm run start` runs `pip install -e .` then `python -m evidence_dag.server` on :3897. The desktop app reaches it over HTTP only (SCIFORGE_EVIDENCE_DAG_SERVICE_URL) through the package desktop sidecar and embedded-view contract modules. LLM calls use only Model Router env (EDAG_MODEL_ROUTER_*); ship the src/ + ui/ + desktop/ + pyproject.toml.
